results.promptLabel: v2 grounded cut (time jump, fight energy, subject reframe)
results.note: From extend blind: baseline and v1 nearly agree; v2 targets mid-scene fight energy and new-subject scrambles baseline misses.

results.promptLabel: v3 speaker-cue clarified (bare name/parenthetical/off-screen voice = extend)
results.note: From claude-sonnet-5 run 20260722T014117Z_cae4d8 tie vs baseline: model flipped s63_b35 ('a deep soft voice-the ELEPHANT') and s26_b23 ('Mowgli (scornfully).') to hard_cut, reading the 'new primary subject after a different speaker' rule too literally against bare speaker-naming cues. v3 clarifies that rule is for an actual physical entrance/reframe, not a name tag, and explicitly lists off-screen voice reveals and name+parenthetical cues under extend.
